title: Enigmatech
description: Harness the powers of the unknown and create enigmatic technology.
body:
![Enigmatech Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3bb3a596c47f7b703dff799924fa79e9d6e7419.png)

🧿About
---
Enigmatech is a NeoForge + Fabric (mostly) tech-focused modpack that aims to provide a challenging modded experience for 1.21.1. Develop technology on multiple fronts in order to bring order (or chaos) to the Overworld and many other dimensions. Whether you prefer tried and true melee combat, the security of a gun, or something even more advanced, you will be able to find the means to carve out your place in this enigmatic universe of mysteries.

**Note:** _Due to the amount of mods, we recommend increasing your instance's allocated RAM for a smoother experience_.

⚡️QoL Additions
---
Alongside the content mods, Enigmatech also has a robust layout of optimization and QoL mods. These include mods that rework how Minecraft utilizes memory and culls entities in order to boost performance. Additionally, there are mods that allow you to pick up, carry, and place single tile entities (chests, furnaces, spawners, etc.), an automatic chest sorting system, and the ability to cut down an entire tree at once. These are just a few of the additions you'll find in the pack that enhance the experience! 

🔄Changes
---
Enigmatech may occasionally receive updates. These updates may include new additions, changes/fixes, or enhanced compatibility and configuration with existing mods. Any updates will be listed in the Changelog.

📋Modlist
---
All mods are owned and maintained by their creators. Please review the list below for more information on each.
